name: Shahi Korma
keywords: indian ethnic easy entertain main dish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine garlic, ginger, almonds, and 6 tablespoons water. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a large, deep pot or wok over medium-high heat. Brown the meat cubes on all sides, removing them with a slotted spoon and placing them in a bowl.
3. Add cardamom, cloves, and cinnamon to the hot oil. When the cloves puff up, add onions and stir-fry until golden brown.
4. Lower heat to medium and add the garlic-ginger-almond paste along with coriander, cumin, and cayenne pepper. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until slightly browned.
5. Return meat to the pot and add remaining liquid (broth), salt, and heavy cream. Bring mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer on low heat for lamb (1 hour) or beef (2 hours). Stir frequently during cooking and skim off any foam that rises to the surface.
6. Sprinkle garam masala over the dish before serving.
